internal_anchors.total_links: verified by test suite (2050 tests, 0 failures — Section 3: Internal Links)
internal_anchors.details: All href="#..." targets and showTab() calls verified by test.js. All 11 showTab targets match tab IDs. All 67 WIN anchors (id="winNNN") present.

tab_structure.nav_chain_valid: N/A — site uses tab buttons, not sectionNav prev/next chain
tab_structure.details: 11 tabs: overview (default active), evaluate, model, selftest, wins, pages, killshots, predictions, falsify, ai, refs. All tab button showTab() targets resolve. No duplicate IDs. All tabs contain headings. Overview is the default active tab.

external_links.details: 46 non-citation URLs checked (DOI/publisher domains skipped per policy). 45 OK, 0 broken, 1 timeout (ESA Gaia — known slow government site, not a real issue).

data_prose_consistency.details: All counts computed from wins.json at build time via {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens. Build output matches published HTML exactly (0 diff lines). Verdicts: Refuted by Data=9, Self-Contradicted=13, Misleading=22, Std Model Explains=16, Not Demonstrated=3, Unfalsifiable=4. Total=67. new_in_v51=28. code_analysis: all 67 reviewed, hardcoded=26, live_fetch=4, none=37, relabels_standard=48, post_hoc=65, derives_from_dome=3.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 67 WIN anchors (id="winNNN") present in HTML. All WINs appear in summary table. detail_group references internally consistent.

build_reproducibility.details: Fresh build from wins.json + sections.json produces identical output to published docs/index.html. Zero diff lines.

issues_found.description: Killshots tab skips from h1 directly to h3 (no h2 level). Six h3 headings follow the single h1.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Either promote kill shot headings to h2 or add an intermediate h2 grouping header after the h1.

issues_found.description: ESA Gaia portal (cosmos.esa.int/web/gaia) timed out on both attempts. Known slow government site.
issues_found.suggested_fix: No action needed — ESA sites are frequently slow. Monitor on next run.

summary: Site is structurally sound. Build is reproducible (0 diff lines). All 2050 tests pass. All 11 tabs functional with correct showTab targets. All 67 WIN anchors present. All computed counts match data. 46 external links checked: 45 OK, 1 timeout (ESA Gaia — known slow). One moderate heading hierarchy issue in killshots tab (h1→h3 skip). No critical or major issues.
